text:
I disabled INPUT in make config and reinstalled. It still is looking for IR:


Registered IR keymap rc-hauppauge
ir-kbd-i2c: i2c IR (HD-PVR) detected at i2c-128/128-0071/ir0 [Hauppage HD PVR I2C]
webcamd-usb-interface : i2c IR TX device register failed
webcamd: Cannot find USB device
